project: PRJ03251 - Baker Hughes - Baker Hughes Qatar - NFR2-2_NFR2-5A - MFC
comment: Mobilisation delayed to 22nd at the earliest. QA/QC complete. Gate passes ready to collect on the 17th, awaiting supplementary passes for RLIC incase of boat transfer. AM returned to UK 16th. GP due to return to UK on 18th dependent on updates on 17th regarding potential Wellsanam job.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment:
SLB continued to work through restrictions with 4.62” broach 4.65” GC held up at 430ft.
Continue to broach until they can drift to WRSSSV and Pull the WRSSSV.
Current look ahead MFC run Monday Afternoon this could come forward depending on progress made over the next 24hrs

project: PRJ03313 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-4848_T-108_TBC - MFC
comment: Job Is now delayed until 29th May. But could come forward.

project: PRJ02722 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9886 - SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment:
